I encourage you to send us anonymous feedback and requests about changes
to the class at any time through [Google
Forms](https://forms.gle/uHczdp4aSkRKpnCC6). Feel free to be blunt!

Non-anonymous feedback is also always welcome
through [Canvas](https://canvas.ucdavis.edu/conversations) or in person,
and I\'m planning to do a formal mid-quarter evaluation with some
specific questions.
